caption: A woman with dark hair is seen from the chest up, wearing a striped purple and white button-down shirt and a black headset with a microphone. She is positioned in an indoor setting with a light-colored wall behind her and a yellow curtain to her left. The text "Nancy Ramya" appears in the bottom left corner of the scene. Throughout the sequence, she remains in a static position, looking toward the camera with a slight smile. Her facial expression and posture remain consistent, with only minimal, subtle movements in her eyes and mouth. No other people or significant objects are visible in the environment. The overall lighting is soft and consistent across the frames, showing a steady shot of the woman as she maintains her gaze.
